summary: A clip from a Fox News split-screen segment. A bearded man in a dark suit is interviewed on the left, labeled MARKWAYNE MULLIN | DHS SECRETARY. The right side shows footage of a man in a tartan tie speaking into a microphone at an event with AFSCME and League of United Latin American Citizens backdrops. The lower-third reads TOM STEYER: AS GOVERNOR, I'LL PROSECUTE ICE.

script.scene: A man is interviewed at left, labeled MARKWAYNE MULLIN | DHS SECRETARY; event footage plays at right.
Footage shows a man speaking at an event with a League of United Latin American Citizens backdrop; banner reads TOM STEYER: AS GOVERNOR, I'LL PROSECUTE ICE.

notable_text: MARKWAYNE MULLIN | DHS SECRETARY; TOM STEYER: AS GOVERNOR, I'LL PROSECUTE ICE; AFSCME; League of United Latin American Citizens
